action.reasoning: Observation: Best mean_r2=0.303 (iter11, hidden=768/4, select-on-r2_q, clip[-50,50]) with r2_q=0.076; recent runs regress to large negative due to ptend_q exploding on test (r2~-8e4) despite val_r2_q~0.16. Val maxabs(q)=3.06 confirms outliers in preds cause R2 collapse even with clip. Analysis: MSE sensitive to rare large errors on test dist-shift; high q_weight/capacity leads to overfitting. Curves plateau early. Decision: Switch to Huber loss (delta=1.0) for outlier robustness, tighten predict clip[-5,5], reduce capacity (hidden=512/blocks=3/dropout=0.5), noise=0.15/q_weight=5/output_std=0.01/select-on-mean_val_r2/lr=3e-4/epochs=60/cosine. Update model/train/predict.py; train then submit_eval on best.pt (fits ~20min iter time).
